title: Rebuild and return: Germany expects 800,000 Syrians to leave before 2030
summary_full: Most Syrians, "first and foremost for those who abuse our hospitality", should return home within three years, said the German Chancellor
summary_public: Most Syrians, "first and foremost for those who abuse our hospitality", should return home within three years, said the German Chancellor
